projects.title: Bloody Ending
projects.cardDesc: VFX & Weapon Concept Artist on an unreleased indie title — 15-person team
projects.description: Currently working as VFX Concept Artist and Weapon Concept Artist on an unreleased indie title with a 15-person cross-disciplinary team. The role involves designing VFX concepts and weapon asset sheets from ideation to colour-ready finals, maintaining visual consistency with the broader art direction.

projects.title: Project RKN
projects.sub: Personal IP · 2023 – Present · Photoshop, Procreate, Blender
projects.cardDesc: Self-directed dark fantasy IP — characters, demons, living bio-mechanical weapons and environmental props.
projects.description: RKN is a self-directed dark fantasy IP built as a world-building exercise and design portfolio. The project started with a demon boss design and expanded into a full cast of characters, a set of living bio-mechanical weapons, creature designs, and environmental props. Every element follows a silhouette-first pipeline: thumbnail exploration → refined silhouettes → line art → colour final. The 3D props were modelled in Blender and textured in Photoshop.

projects.title: Illustrations 2026
projects.cardDesc: Atmospheric narrative scenes, vibrant pop character pieces, fan art and experimental studies — shared on ArtStation and Instagram.
projects.description: A selection of personal illustration work exploring colour, mood, and stylized rendering techniques. The work spans atmospheric narrative scenes, vibrant pop character pieces, fan art, and experimental studies. These illustrations are shared on ArtStation and Instagram.

projects.title: Crash Test Rogue-lite
projects.sub: Roblox Studio · Team Project · Prototype Stage
projects.cardDesc: A rouge-lite prototype with a Crash Test Dummy protagonist and a body-mutation system — built on Roblox with a small team.
projects.description: A rouge-lite prototype in the style of Vampire Survivor and Megabonk, developed with a small team on Roblox. The protagonist is a Crash Test Dummy robot thrown into a post-apocalyptic world. The core mechanic involved collecting scrap to mutate the character's body, unlocking different implants and abilities. The metamorphosis system was implemented at a base level but could not be fully integrated into the game loop before the project was shelved. The team was satisfied with the prototype achieved.

projects.title: Bun Bun Band — Animatronics
projects.cardDesc: A trio of animatronic characters for a published Fortnite Creative map — penguin, bunny and frog with cohesive shape language.
projects.description: A trio of animatronic characters designed for a Fortnite Creative map published in 2024. The characters — a penguin, a bunny, and a frog — were designed as a complementary set with cohesive shape language and colour palettes. Each character was taken from initial concept sketch through final 3D model and implemented directly in UEFN. The map is available to play for free on Fortnite.

projects.title: Illustrations
projects.cardDesc: Game-ready character sheets with turnarounds to painterly finished pieces — originals and commissions.
projects.description: Character illustration work covering a range of styles — from stylized game-ready character sheets with turnarounds to more painterly finished pieces. Includes original characters and commissions.

projects.title: Project Forest - Animal Crossing Horror
projects.sub: Horror Game Prototype · Unreal Engine 5, Blender
projects.cardDesc: A horror reinterpretation of Animal Crossing — unsettling chibi characters, 3D environments, and a working dialogue system in UE5.
projects.description: A horror reinterpretation of Animal Crossing developed as a team project. The concept reimagines the game's cute chibi characters in a sinister, unsettling light. The project included full character concept sheets, 3D modelling of characters, buildings and environmental props in Blender, and implementation in Unreal Engine 5 with a working dialogue system and explorable village environment. The project was not released.

projects.title: Backrooms — Fortnite Creative 2.0
projects.cardDesc: Environment design and full character/creature roster — from concept through final 3D implementation on Fortnite Creative 2.0.
projects.description: The last project developed for Fortnite Creative 2.0. Like the other Studio Neptune projects, this covered both the environment design and all characters and creatures — from concept through to final 3D model implementation. Assets include a yellow robot guard character, a humanoid creature sculpt, environment props, and game UI icons. Published and playable on Fortnite.

projects.title: School Projects
projects.sub: Game Jam Projects · 2020–2023 · Concept Art & UI
projects.cardDesc: Three collaborative game-jam titles — Deadline, Kronoparadox, Bad to the Root — character concepts, creature art and UI design.
projects.description: Three collaborative game-jam titles developed as part of Studio Neptune's Event Horizon programme: Deadline, Kronoparadox, and Bad to the Root. Andrea contributed character and creature concept art as well as UI design. Each project involved cross-team playtesting sessions and rapid iteration cycles under game-jam constraints.

bullets: Designing VFX and weapon concept sheets for an unreleased title in active production.
